chapter_title.en: On eligibility for the caliphate, the need for sagacity in fighting against Muslims

text: [رسول الله :] أَمِينُ وَحْيِهِ، وَخَاتَمُ رُسُلِهِ، وَبَشِيرُ رَحْمَتِهِ، وَنَذِيرُ نِقْمَتِهِ.

en.sayed-ali-raza: The Prophet is the trustee of Allāh’s revelation, the Last of His Prophets, the giver of tidings of His mercy and the warner for His chastisement.
